from sympy import Symbol
for assumptions in ({'integer': True}, {'rational': True}, {'irrational': True}, {'even': True}, {'odd': True}, {'prime': True}, {'algebraic': True}):

    print(assumptions, x.is_finite)

from sympy import *
for x in [oo, -oo]:
 print(x, {p:getattr(x,'is_'+p) for p in ('finite','rational','irrational','algebraic','transcendental')})
x=Symbol('x', rational=True); y=Symbol('y', finite=False)
for ext in (Min, Max): print(ext(x,y), ext(x,y).assumptions0, ext(x,y).is_rational)

/bin/zsh -c "sed -n '190,230p' sympy/functions/elementary/tests/test_miscellaneous.py; ./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import itertools as it
from sympy import *
r = Symbol('r', real=True); a=Symbol('a', algebraic=True); t=Symbol('t', transcendental=True); q=Symbol('q', rational=True); p=Symbol('p', positive=True); n=Symbol('n', negative=True); i=Symbol('i', integer=True); o=Symbol('o', odd=True); e=Symbol('e', even=True); k=Symbol('k', finite=True)
reals=[r,a,t,q,p,n,i,o,e,k]
for ext in (Max,Min):
 for x,y in it.product(reals,repeat=2):
  z=ext(x,y)
  if not(x.is_rational and y.is_rational) and not(x.is_irrational and y.is_irrational) and z.is_rational is not None:
   print(ext.__name__,x,y,x.is_rational,y.is_rational,z,z.is_rational,z.is_finite); raise SystemExit
PY"
